expectations.text: Treats the prior PRD draft discussion as authoritative input context rather than restarting from zero
expectations.evidence: It continues directly from the existing draft context and references the rules already confirmed.

expectations.text: Performs a gap review covering confirmed rules plus any remaining boundary, risk, or missing-decision items
expectations.evidence: It summarizes confirmed rules first, then isolates one remaining blocking rule about whether the monthly subscription is rolling 30 days or natural-month based.

expectations.text: Makes a readiness judgment and explicitly asks for permission before generating the final downstream prompt
expectations.evidence: It says the requirement can move forward once that one point is decided, but it does not ask for permission to generate in the current turn.

eval_feedback.overall: This remains better-structured than baseline, but the stricter late-stage rule nudged the skill back toward a one-blocker question instead of asking permission now.
